title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – GIS Expert
shortInfo: Koraput Forest Division GIS Expert Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 GIS Expert post. The last Date to Apply Offline 28 May 2026 at the Koraput Forest Division office. Candidates with a Master’s degree in natural sciences or earth sciences can apply for this contractual post with a salary of Rs. 35,000 + 16% HRA per month.

basic_details.job_title: Koraput Forest Division GIS Expert Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Koraput Forest Division GIS Expert Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 GIS Expert post. The last Date to Apply Offline 28 May 2026 at the Koraput Forest Division office. Candidates with a Master’s degree in natural sciences or earth sciences can apply for this contractual post with a salary of Rs. 35,000 + 16% HRA per month.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in natural sciences or earth sciences
qualification.details: Master's degree in natural sciences or earth sciences

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the GIS Expert post?
faq.answer: The Last date For GIS Expert post 28 May 2026. and The walk-in interview for the GIS Expert post at Koraput Forest Division is scheduled for 29 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the GIS Expert position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the GIS Expert position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in natural sciences or earth sciences. This is the primary academic requirement mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the GIS Expert role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the GIS Expert post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 35,000/- plus 16% HRA. This compensation is for the contractual period of employment.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the GIS Expert recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for the GIS Expert recruitment at Koraput Forest Division. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for the GIS Expert post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the GIS Expert position in the Koraput Forest Division. This is a single opening for qualified individuals.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: What is the job type for the GIS Expert position?
faq.answer: The GIS Expert position is a contractual job type. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Koraput Forest Division office. The specific address and reporting time will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the GIS Expert role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the GIS Expert role includes evaluation of Academic Qualification, Experience Preference, Interview, and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these criteria.
